title: Ranking Peptide Binders by Affinity with AlphaFold**
benchmark_lesson: AlphaFold-style competitive modeling can inform peptide binder ranking when individual peptide structures are predictable
limitation: ranking applicability depends on structural stability and does not prove de novo generation quality

title: PPI-Affinity: A Web Tool for the Prediction and Optimization of Protein-Peptide and Protein-Protein Binding Affinity
benchmark_lesson: protein-peptide affinity scoring requires peptide-aware features and should not be treated as generic small-molecule or PPI scoring
limitation: web-tool/scoring context differs from de novo generation and must be calibrated

title: TPepPro: a deep learning model for predicting peptide-protein interactions
benchmark_lesson: protein-peptide interaction prediction can support ranking or filter design candidates
limitation: interaction prediction does not replace affinity or experimental validation

title: A deep attention model for wide-genome protein-peptide binding affinity prediction at a sequence level
benchmark_lesson: sequence-level affinity prediction highlights the need for separate sequence-only ranking tasks
limitation: sequence-only predictions require assay-aware interpretation and external validation

title: Leveraging machine learning models for peptide-protein interaction prediction
benchmark_lesson: ML-based peptide-protein interaction predictors can guide benchmark feature and control design
limitation: predictor performance may be dataset-specific and leakage-prone

title: Sequence-based prediction of the intrinsic solubility of peptides containing non-natural amino acids
benchmark_lesson: sequence-level peptide solubility prediction supports metadata-level developability screening
limitation: solubility prediction is a proxy and does not replace measured solubility

title: Delocalized quinolinium-macrocyclic peptides an atypical chemotype for CNS penetration
benchmark_lesson: macrocycle and atypical chemotype studies show that developability cannot be reduced to binding scores
limitation: case-specific chemistry and assay context limit generalization

title: Accurate de novo design of high-affinity protein-binding macrocycles using deep learning
benchmark_lesson: macrocycle design motivates explicit cyclic constraints and structure/developability reporting
limitation: high-affinity macrocycle design does not directly benchmark short linear or D-peptide tasks
